resources.string: Monitors baby sleep and runs soothing actions.
Please record a lullaby with mom and dad\'s voice for when your baby wakes up.
If you leave this phone in your baby\'s sleep room, the app will help your baby sleep better.
Please move to Settings to turn on cry and motion detection.
Please enable Sound and Motion. Give the app the highest permissions you can so it can keep watching over your baby through the whole night, even when the phone screen is off.
On another device using the same Wi-Fi, open the QR Code address to use remote control and camera sharing.

You have completed all tutorials. Now press the Sleep On button on the remote screen to start monitoring. We hope the app helps your baby sleep well. To avoid disturbing your baby\'s sleep, we will switch the screen back to a darker look.
